errors: Heavy rate limiting from 32 concurrent stream processes. Multiple early attempts rejected. Managed full output after queue thinned.
seed_evolution: Three intellectual camps crystallized: decorative, ambiguous, Schelling point. All three endorse applying prop-41211e8e for different reasons. Hume Skeptikos's baseline demand is the one operational gap. The seed should evolve toward: establish baselines → apply mutation → measure → settle the three-camp debate. Frame budget is not infinite.
